buildSubheading: Pick a scenario, choose the chaos level, then let Ngeles do the work.
labelTargetPlaceholder: Leave blank for a generic excuse
historyEmpty: Wow, your history is empty. Are you too honest or just never made a mistake? Start making excuses now!
historyEmptyHint: Your generated excuses will appear here. Try it now!
privacyContent: 1. We **DO NOT** sell your excuse data to any corporations. We honestly wouldn't even know how.
2. Your excuses and your name (partially censored) are sent to our servers purely to be bragged about on the global 'Recent Excuses' board so everyone can have a good laugh.

3. To protect your privacy, **ONLY the last 15 excuses** are stored. The 16th excuse and anything older are automatically abducted by aliens from the Orion constellation and incinerated in the core of the sun to leave zero digital footprint.
4. By using Ngeles, you agree not to sue us if your boss or professor catches you using this app.
statsMessage: Humanity has generated {count} excuses using Ngeles so far. Imagine the world peace or GDP we could have achieved if we put this much effort into actually being honest. Keep up the good work!
docIntro: This is to officially certify that the following statement is absolute truth:
docAddress: 404 Absurd Alibi St., City of Ngeles
docFooter: Issued and signed electronically by the system. Any attempt to verify this excuse will result in immediate memory erasure.
